languages.text: Вольный Торговец заключил союз с Инквизитором. Теперь ему предстоит найти связную с позывным "Элана".

traits.locale_text: Вольный Торговец заключил союз с Инквизитором. Теперь ему предстоит найти связную с позывным "Элана".

languages.text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец заключил союз с Инквизитором. Теперь ему предстоит найти связную с позывным "Элана".

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the callsign 'Elana.'
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. Now {mf|he|she} must find the agent operating under the callsign 'Elana.'
The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat eine Allianz mit dem Inquisitor geschlossen. Jetzt gilt es, die Verbindung mit dem Rufzeichen 'Elana' zu finden.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} hat eine Allianz mit dem Inquisitor geschlossen. Jetzt gilt es, die Verbindung mit dem Rufzeichen 'Elana' zu finden.

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a formé une alliance avec l'Inquisition. La prochaine étape consiste à trouver l'intermédiaire répondant au nom de code « Elana ».
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a formé une alliance avec l'Inquisition. La prochaine étape consiste à trouver l'intermédiaire répondant au nom de code « Elana ».

languages.text: 行商浪人已经和审判官结成了同盟。下一步是找到代号为“埃拉娜”的联络人。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人已经和审判官结成了同盟。下一步是找到代号为“埃拉娜”的联络人。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha forjado una alianza con el Inquisidor. El siguiente paso es encontrar a su contacto, cuyo nombre en clave es «Elana».
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha forjado una alianza con el Inquisidor. El siguiente paso es encontrar a su contacto, cuyo nombre en clave es «Elana».

languages.text: Hür Tacir, Engizisyoncu ile bir ittifak kurdu. Bir sonraki adım, "Elana" çağrı işaretli kişiyi bulmak olacak.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: Hür Tacir, Engizisyoncu ile bir ittifak kurdu. Bir sonraki adım, "Elana" çağrı işaretli kişiyi bulmak olacak.

languages.text: ローグトレーダーはインクィジターと同盟を結んだ。次のステップは、コールサイン「エラーナ」の連絡先を探すことだ。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has forged an alliance with the Inquisitor. The next step is to find the liaison with the call sign "Elana."

traits.locale_text: ローグトレーダーはインクィジターと同盟を結んだ。次のステップは、コールサイン「エラーナ」の連絡先を探すことだ。
